text.title: AI Incident Postmortem Template Core Rules
text.summary: Five testable rules every ML-specific postmortem enforces.

rule.statement: Postmortem fills four ML-specific axes: root_cause_class (drift / prompt-regression / schema-change / judge-change / retrieval-failure / tool-fault / hallucination / data-poisoning / other), model_version_before, model_version_after, prompt_sha_before/after.

rationale.source: Anthropic incident response practice; Google SRE workbook for ML

rule.rationale: DevOps templates omit these; without them, repeat incidents are not patternable.

rule.statement: Every closed postmortem names the eval-guard that would have caught the incident OR an explicit rationale why none can be added. "We'll be more careful" is not a guard.

rationale.source: LangSmith blog; production incident retros at scale

rule.rationale: Without a guard, the same incident recurs at the next retrain/prompt change.

rule.statement: Language is blameless: actions are described by role, not person; no "Alex shouldn't have" / "X failed to" phrasing.
rule.rationale: Blame culture suppresses honest reporting; the team loses the data the postmortem was meant to produce.

rule.statement: Blast radius is quantified: number of affected users (exact or bounded), revenue impact USD, durations (detect→mitigate→resolve).
rule.rationale: Subjective severity tags drift across teams; numbers don't.

rule.statement: The eval set is updated to include this incident as a test case before the postmortem is marked closed. Version bump of golden set is recorded in the report.

rationale.source: LangChain / Vertex AI eval best practices

rule.rationale: Without this step, the eval set is missing the cases that already bit production.

example.title: Filled ML axes
example.code: root_cause_class: prompt-regression model_version_before: claude-sonnet-4@2026-04-12 model_version_after: claude-sonnet-4@2026-04-12 (unchanged) prompt_sha_before: a3f1c9 prompt_sha_after: a3f1c9 (revert) eval_guard_added: tests/eval/test_no_external_url_in_summary.py

example.title: Generic DevOps template applied
example.code: Root cause: bug in prompt Fix: deployed fix Action items: be more careful when changing prompts
example.note: No ML axes; no eval guard; not actionable.
